benefits.description: Rapid healing after ACL surgery. Could walk out of hospital barely using crutches. Used stationary bike 3 days after surgery. Walking without limp at 3 days.
Physio noted unusually fast recovery at 1 week and 8 week checkpoints. Therapist stated she had never seen anyone recover that fast.

protocol_notes: Used peptides pre-operatively (TB-500 loaded for 1-2 weeks prior) and during surgery for ACL repair. Combined with intensive prehab and rehab. Also used joint supplements including collagen and natural eggshell membrane. Leg weights 3+ times weekly and daily cycling. Clean diet.
